rationale: Review 2 correctly identifies a real naming inconsistency: `Deck.smul_eq_apply` and `Homeomorph.smul_def` are structurally identical simp-unfold lemmas within the same PR but named differently, conflicting with the Mathlib `smul_def` convention; this is confirmed directly in the diff and a maintainer would want it harmonized. Review 1 missed this genuine issue.
